meta.title: AI PDF Assistant — Summaries, Chat & OCR
meta.description: Upload a PDF and understand long documents in seconds: AI summaries, chat, and scanned OCR.

home.headline: Rethink reading: AI helps you grasp long PDFs in seconds.
home.subhead: Transform how you read. Let AI help you understand PDFs.

summary.title: Smart summary
summary.desc: Generate concise summaries and surface key takeaways and conclusions at a glance.

chat.title: PDF chat
chat.desc: Ask questions about your document—get instant answers with precise source references.

ocr.title: OCR
ocr.desc: Extract text from scans and images so static PDFs become searchable, conversational content.

tools.title: PDF utilities
tools.desc: Merge, split, convert—handle everyday document tasks in one place.

security.title: Security
security.desc: Encryption in transit and at rest—privacy first for sensitive files.

hero.hints: OCR for scans · long documents · 90+ languages

workspace.pdfPlaceholder: Parsed PDF content will appear here.
workspace.summaryBullet1: This document outlines the core concepts and intended audience.
workspace.summaryBullet2: Major sections follow a logical order for quick navigation.
workspace.summaryBullet3: The conclusion highlights actionable takeaways and next steps.
workspace.question1: What is the main purpose of the document?
workspace.question2: What are the key conclusions or recommendations?
workspace.question3: How can I apply this to my work?

uploadModal.title: Upload your files
uploadModal.description: Choose a source or drag files into the area on the right.
uploadModal.formats: Supported formats: PDF, DOCX, PPTX, XLSX, PNG, JPEG
